subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and true companions! Man is, in truth, the preamble of the manifest Book of Creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و دوستان حقیقی انسان که فی الحقیقه عنوان کتاب مبین امکان
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant
